summary: Presale Sync to Inventory Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 6/6 API tests pass. Frontend: All UI elements verified (Sync to Inventory button, Pre-sale column in inventory).
passed_tests: POST /api/sysbook/presale-import/sync-inventory returns sync results (created, matched, updated_orders, total_reserved_units)
GET /api/sysbook/inventory/products shows products with reserved_quantity > 0 after sync
After sync, presale order items all have matched: true
Sync is idempotent - calling twice doesn't create duplicate products (second call: created=0)
Pre-sale column values in inventory match expected reservations from orders
GET /api/sysbook/presale-import/orders returns orders with correct structure
UI: Sync to Inventory button appears on Pre-Sale Import admin page (/admin#presale-import)
UI: Pre-sale column visible in Sysbook Inventory table (/admin#sysbook-inventory)
UI: Pre-sale column shows correct reserved quantities with amber/red highlighting
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tested against existing 31 presale orders with 308 items and 116 inventory products.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Presale Sync to Inventory feature fully working. sync_presale_to_inventory() method in presale_import_service.py aggregates presale items, creates missing products, links items (matched=true), and sets reserved_quantity. The sync is idempotent - subsequent calls find 0 unmatched items. Pre-sale column in SysbookInventoryTable.jsx shows reserved_quantity values. 116 products, 31 orders, 308 total items all matched.
